title: Phase 5: Update grammar tables and scanners
description: Update tsgo-generate (cmd/tsgo-generate) to emit imports from internal/core and internal/subtree instead of the root package. Regenerate all 15 language grammar tables in internal/testgrammars/. Update all scanner imports in scanners/<lang>/scanner.go to use lexer/ for Lexer and language/ for ExternalScanner directly instead of the root package. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 5.
